Title: 2030 Initiative: Reducing Flaring and Oil and Gas Emissions

Coverage (Areas/Assets/Entities): Oil and gas fields, refineries, and gas processing assets at the national level
Prior Impact (MtCO2e/yr; Period; Method/: To be determined previously; 2025-2035 factors; facilities; escalating factors for capturing flared gases and measuring gas emissions from bottom to top; international climate governance 2006/2019
Subsequent Impact (if available; Short t: To be determined subsequently; MRV infrastructure established (counters, OGI/LDAR); Goal 7/Goal 8, Goal 13, Goal 8

Data Sources / Quality Assurance and Qua: 2017-2023 consolidated avoided inventory; Issuance of 9 specific contribution reports; National draft reports; Combating national flaring intensity; Adaptation actions from national convention files 2030 for limiting gas flaring and monitoring operations; Commitments with UN IMEO/MARS programs
